use_cases: Expandable FAQ sections on support pages
Settings panels with collapsible option groups
ai_summary: A clean, accessible collapsible component built with @ark-ui/react that toggles content visibility through a click-triggered button with a rotating chevron indicator. Features smooth slide and fade animations, dark mode support, and Tailwind CSS styling for a minimal, production-ready UI pattern commonly used for accordions, FAQs, and expandable content sections.
